aesthetic: Minimal, elegant, enterprise-grade, premium, modern, clean, highly professional.

typography.notes: Avoid Inter/Roboto. Use Manrope for a thick, geometric, yet highly accessible enterprise feel for headings. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for dense data tables and body text for readability. Both available via Google Fonts.

spacing.general: Generous container padding (p-6, p-8) to ensure 'lots of whitespace'.
spacing.components: Dense inner component spacing (gap-4, gap-6) for 'Control Room' grid layout.
spacing.layout_grid: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-column bento box approach for dashboards.

components.card: Use subtle 1px borders (#1E293B) with bg-[#141A27] and rounded-[16px]. Apply soft inner drop-shadows. On interactive cards, apply hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_10px_30px_-5px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300.
components.hero_card: Top KPI or Welcome cards can use subtle gradients: bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-900/30 to-[#141A27] border-blue-900/50.
components.sidebar: Fixed left, bg-[#0A0E17] (matches base to feel cardless) or integrated deeply. Highlight active link with subtle bg-blue-900/30 and blue left border.
components.header: Top nav must be glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0E17]/70 border-b border-[#1E293B]. Sticky top.
components.table: Shadcn UI table. Use Plus Jakarta Sans. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-[#1E293B]/50). Sticky header with backdrop blur.
components.kanban: Swimlane columns bg-[#0A0E17]/50. Cards bg-[#141A27] border border-[#1E293B] cursor-grab rounded-[16px]. Hover ring primary.
components.button: Primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#3B82F6]. Secondary: border border-[#334155] text-[#F8FAFC] hover:bg-[#1E293B]. Rounded-lg.
components.inputs: bg-[#0A0E17] border-[#334155] text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB] focus:border-transparent rounded-lg.
components.charts: Recharts with dark mode tooltips (bg-[#141A27] border-[#1E293B]). Use primary blue, success green, warning orange, error red for chart series.

motion.modal: framer-motion zoom-in (initial opacity 0 scale 0.95, animate opacity 1 scale 1)

icons_and_assets.icon_library: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for premium duotone/regular weights.

image_urls.empty_states: Use Lucide icons scaled up with low opacity (text-slate-700) instead of illustrations for a cleaner, high-end SaaS feel.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard', data-testid='kanban-ticket-card'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the provided color hex codes. Extend the tailwind theme explicitly.
Set the global background to #0A0E17 and text to #F8FAFC in index.css.
Install Google Fonts 'Manrope' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans'. Apply Manrope to headings (h1-h6) and Plus Jakarta Sans to body/sans.
Construct the Sidebar Navigation with the requested links: Dashboard, Customers, Complaints, Support Tickets, Interactions, Reports, Analytics, Notifications, Settings, Help Center, Logout.
Construct the Top Navigation with Global Search, Notifications, Theme Toggle, Profile, and Quick Add.
Ensure all cards use rounded-[16px] or rounded-2xl to match the requested 16-20px radius.
Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, selects, tables, drawers (Sheet), and dialogs. Strip out their default white-borders and use the dark #1E293B border instead.
Dashboard KPIs and charts MUST fit in a grid layout (bento box style). Do not leave jagged bottoms.
Ensure micro-interactions are present (e.g., hover states on rows, button scale on click, card lifts).
